case_title: HELEN BLAIN VS. HERBERTH ABIMAEL MAZARIEGOS et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSIVE DECLARATION OF COUNSEL TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLAIN, HELEN

BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
